function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_xip_flash.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_xip_flash
description: >
  Verifies the XIP (Execute-in-Place) flash controller of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover reset-vector boot fetch at 0x00000000, CSR smoke access, data
  integrity over the full 512 KB range, and address-boundary behaviour at the
  512 KB ceiling (0x0007_FFFF / 0x0008_0000).
checklist_ids:
  - XIP-01
  - XIP-02
  - XIP-03
  - XIP-04
test_names:
  - test_xip_boot_fetch
  - test_xip_reg_smoke
  - test_xip_data_integrity
  - test_xip_addr_boundary
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

flash_image:
  hex_file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
  base_addr: 0x00000000
  size_bytes: 0x00080000   # 512 KB

external_devices: []

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: load_flash_image
    file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
    description: Pre-load flash BFM with known hex image containing test patterns
  - step: 2
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CPU begins fetching from 0x00000000
  - step: 3
    action: monitor_ifu_addr
    expected_first_fetch: 0x00000000
    description: Observe first instruction fetch address from CPU IFU
  - step: 4
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: XIP_CTRL
    registers: [STATUS, CONFIG, BASE_ADDR, SIZE]
    description: Read all XIP controller CSRs; compare against documented reset values
  - step: 5
    action: read_memory_range
    start_addr: 0x00000000
    end_addr: 0x0007FFFF
    pattern: WALKING_ONES
    description: Read 512 KB via AHB; verify walking-ones pattern placed in flash image
  - step: 6
    action: read_memory_address
    addr: 0x0007FFFF
    description: Access last valid 512 KB address
  - step: 7
    action: read_memory_address
    addr: 0x00080000
    expected_response: BUS_ERROR_OR_WRAP
    description: Access one byte past 512 KB boundary; expect fault or wrap

checks:
  - id: CHK-XIP-01
    checklist_id: XIP-01
    description: First CPU instruction fetch is from address 0x00000000
    expected: IFU request address = 0x00000000 on first valid clock after reset release
  - id: CHK-XIP-02
    checklist_id: XIP-02
    description: All XIP CSRs return documented reset values
    expected: No unexpected values in XIP register reads
  - id: CHK-XIP-03
    checklist_id: XIP-03
    description: All 512 KB read-back data matches pre-loaded flash image pattern
    expected: Zero byte mismatches across full image
  - id: CHK-XIP-04
    checklist_id: XIP-04
    description: Address 0x0007FFFF read succeeds; 0x00080000 returns error or wraps
    expected: Valid response at 0x0007FFFF; HRESP=ERROR or wrap at 0x00080000

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-XIP checks PASS
  - No data corruption in pattern comparison
  - Flash BFM reports no protocol errors
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_xip_flash
description: >
  Verifies the XIP (Execute-in-Place) flash controller of mspm33c321a_derivative.
  Tests cover reset-vector boot fetch at 0x00000000, CSR smoke access, data
  integrity over the full 512 KB range, and address-boundary behaviour at the
  512 KB ceiling (0x0007_FFFF / 0x0008_0000).
checklist_ids:
  - XIP-01
  - XIP-02
  - XIP-03
  - XIP-04
test_names:
  - test_xip_boot_fetch
  - test_xip_reg_smoke
  - test_xip_data_integrity
  - test_xip_addr_boundary
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

flash_image:
  hex_file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
  base_addr: 0x00000000
  size_bytes: 0x00080000   # 512 KB

external_devices: []

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: load_flash_image
    file: verification/fw/xip_boot_smoke.hex
    description: Pre-load flash BFM with known hex image containing test patterns
  - step: 2
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CPU begins fetching from 0x00000000
  - step: 3
    action: monitor_ifu_addr
    expected_first_fetch: 0x00000000
    description: Observe first instruction fetch address from CPU IFU
  - step: 4
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: XIP_CTRL
    registers: [STATUS, CONFIG, BASE_ADDR, SIZE]
    description: Read all XIP controller CSRs; compare against documented reset values
  - step: 5
    action: read_memory_range
    start_addr: 0x00000000
    end_addr: 0x0007FFFF
    pattern: WALKING_ONES
    description: Read 512 KB via AHB; verify walking-ones pattern placed in flash image
  - step: 6
    action: read_memory_address
    addr: 0x0007FFFF
    description: Access last valid 512 KB address
  - step: 7
    action: read_memory_address
    addr: 0x00080000
    expected_response: BUS_ERROR_OR_WRAP
    description: Access one byte past 512 KB boundary; expect fault or wrap

checks:
  - id: CHK-XIP-01
    checklist_id: XIP-01
    description: First CPU instruction fetch is from address 0x00000000
    expected: IFU request address = 0x00000000 on first valid clock after reset release
  - id: CHK-XIP-02
    checklist_id: XIP-02
    description: All XIP CSRs return documented reset values
    expected: No unexpected values in XIP register reads
  - id: CHK-XIP-03
    checklist_id: XIP-03
    description: All 512 KB read-back data matches pre-loaded flash image pattern
    expected: Zero byte mismatches across full image
  - id: CHK-XIP-04
    checklist_id: XIP-04
    description: Address 0x0007FFFF read succeeds; 0x00080000 returns error or wraps
    expected: Valid response at 0x0007FFFF; HRESP=ERROR or wrap at 0x00080000

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-XIP checks PASS
  - No data corruption in pattern comparison
  - Flash BFM reports no protocol errors
